title: My Grief Is the Shape of My Love
subtitle: An affirmation for the grief that will not resolve on a schedule
excerpt: A short affirmation for grief that is still present. The statement names what grief is and where it comes from, and holds both as real and allowed.

practice.whenToUse: Use when the grief returns and you need a frame for it that is not about getting over it. Good on hard days, anniversaries, and the small unexpected moments.

content.text: A one-minute affirmation for the grief that is still here. The statement does not ask grief to resolve. It names what it is and what it means.
New to affirmations as a practice? Read
My grief is the shape of my love. Both are real. Both are allowed.
Say it when the grief comes back. Say it quietly. Say it as many times as the moment needs.
